svg.title: Cassette 24 V DC life-safety bus
svg.desc: Internal 24 V DC life-safety distribution: 800 V DC primary feeds integral charger in 2 kWh LiFePO4 maintenance UPS, which feeds a life-safety DC panel distributing eight circuits LS-1 through LS-8 covering VESDA, Novec control panel, Jetson BMS primary and standby, ADAM I/O, sump pump, exterior strobes, interior lights, plus Starlink modem and reed switches.
svg.text: Cassette 24 V DC life-safety bus — single-line
Self-contained. No ECP penetration. ≥ 2 hr runtime on loss of primary per ELEC-001 §5.

g.text: 24 V DC · 2 kWh LiFePO4 · Victron or Battle Born
Blue Sea Systems marine-grade · 24 V DC distribution
2 kWh capacity at 356 W peak: 5.6 hr runtime
Exceeds 2 hr NFPA 72 / life-safety design target · 2.8× margin

svg.text: VESDA operating range: 18–30 V · Delivered at panel: 23.7 V ✓
Maintains detection, suppression, BMS, and sump safety functions for ≥ 2 hr on loss of 800 V DC primary.
Jetson BMS A and B both fed — N+1 redundancy preserved through bus failure.
LS-8 work lights are panel-activated only (reed switch gated) — not continuous draw.
Runtime budget assumes all circuits active; real duty cycle typically 60–70% → 8+ hr actual.
